task.desc: Add a Makefile target named validate that runs python3 -m py_compile on all Python scripts in scripts/

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'validate' target to Makefile","target_files":["Makefile"],"patch_commands":"sed -i '/^target:/,/^target:/{N;s/^target:$/target: validate: python3 -m py_compile scripts\/;}/' Makefile","validation_commands":"grep -q 'validate' Makefile","expected_outcome":"Makefile now contains 'validate' target that runs py_compile on scripts/","risk_notes":"None","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}

parsed.patch_commands: sed -i '/^target:/,/^target:/{N;s/^target:$/target: validate: python3 -m py_compile scripts/;}/' Makefile
parsed.expected_outcome: Makefile now contains 'validate' target that runs py_compile on scripts/
